headline: GM and Ford: Bank of America Names 2 Top Auto Stocks to Buy for 2026
summary: The changeover of Presidential Administrations always brings changes of policy priorities, and those can ripple outward. Sometimes, it’s impossible to know where the ripples will end, and sometimes, it’s easy. Last month, one of the easier ripples made itself felt. The second Trump Administration took office promising to roll back large parts of the Biden regulatory regime, including difficult findings on greenhouse gases and automobile fuel economy.
